# Ahmed Shabab Noor

> Software Engineer III at Fin.com | Ex Data Engineer II at Pathao | Based in Dhaka, Bangladesh

## About

Ahmed Shabab Noor is a Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems, data platforms, machine learning, and analytics. He currently works as Software Engineer III at Fin.com, a stablecoin-powered global payment infrastructure company, where he builds payment infrastructure for global money movement using Go, Docker, PostgreSQL, and microservices architecture.

Previously, he was Data Engineer II at Pathao (Bangladesh's largest super-app), where he designed dynamic funnel analytics systems processing 500M+ data points, built a Bangla transliteration service increasing search coverage by 15x, and developed personalization algorithms reducing checkout navigation time by 32%.

He graduated Summa Cum Laude (CGPA 3.99/4.00) in Computer Science and Engineering from United International University with a 100% academic scholarship across 9 trimesters.

- [Email](mailto:ashababnoor@gmail.com): ashababnoor@gmail.com — for professional inquiries

## Skills

- Languages: Go, Python, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C, PHP, Bash
- Cloud & Infrastructure: Google Cloud Platform, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, AWS, Kafka, Consul
- Data Engineering & Analytics: dbt, BigQuery, Redash, Looker Studio, Tableau
- Databases: BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Neo4j, Firebase
- Data Science & ML: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Jupyter, Matplotlib, Plotly, Dash

## Experience

### Software Engineer III - Fin.com (Dec 2025 - Present)
Stablecoin-powered global payment infrastructure company. Building payment infrastructure using Go, Docker, PostgreSQL, and microservices. Designed high-throughput transaction processing systems and developed automated compliance monitoring achieving 99.7% accuracy. Built real-time currency conversion engine handling 50+ currency pairs.

### Data Engineer II - Pathao (Jul 2024 - Dec 2025)
Designed dynamic funnel analytics system processing 500M+ data points. Built Bangla transliteration microservice increasing search coverage by 15x. Developed personalization algorithms reducing checkout navigation time by 32%. Designed A/B testing framework for data-driven product decisions. Built modular data models using dbt with optimized queries for cost savings.

### Data Engineer I - Pathao (Mar 2023 - Jun 2024)
Built ML models for ETA prediction in Dhaka and Chittagong, improving within-threshold rides from 20% to 60%. Developed address parsing service improving hub-level coverage by 10% and saving ~102K BDT/month. Built Bangla-to-English transliteration algorithm for address parsing. Redesigned Firebase user behavioral data pipeline processing 50-60M rows/day. Managed fraud detection systems for food vertical. Conducted A/B test analyses identifying ~$7K USD/month in potential savings. Optimized Redis storage reducing memory consumption by 72%.

### Data Engineering Intern - Pathao (Oct 2022 - Feb 2023)
Built CLI tools for data dictionary workflows. Developed first ML solution for ride pickup ETA prediction for Dhaka city. Researched data governance solutions. Worked on fraud detection using machine learning.

## Education

- B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering - United International University (Summa Cum Laude, CGPA 3.99/4.00, 100% Academic Scholarship)
- Higher Secondary Certificate - Notre Dame College, Dhaka

## Publications

1. "Attention-Based Scene Graph Generation: A Review" - IEEE SKIMA 2022 (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10029570)
2. "A novel method for imbalanced data classification based on label reassignment" - IEEE TENCON 2022 (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9978090)
3. "Diabetes Mellitus prediction using Transfer Learning" - Springer MIET 2022 (https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-34619-4_7)
4. "The impact of data locality on the performance of cluster-based under-sampling" - Springer MIET 2022 (https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-34622-4_16)
